C001.rawBlob: Hi, registering Al-Amin Transport for onboarding. Tax ID is 1234567, bank account MCB 0012345678, account title Al-Amin Transport. We cover City A to B and City B to C. Fleet: 3x 40ft containers and 2x flatbed. App signup done, first load completed last week. On time 92% last quarter, fulfillment 95%.

extract.extractionNotes: All fields extracted cleanly. Truck count confirmed as 5 (3x 40ft + 2x flatbed).

criteria.note: Carrier is registered on the app.
2 lane(s): A-B, B-C. 2 truck type(s): 40ft, flatbed.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: Carrier uses the platform actively — daily load confirmations and tracking updates logged consistently.
92% on-time pickup over the last quarter. Consistently above the 85% SLA threshold.

On A-B: PKR 84,000 vs benchmark PKR 85,000 — at market. On B-C: PKR 84,000 vs PKR 72,000 benchmark — 17% above, reducing score on that lane. Blended score reflects competitive A-B pricing dragged by B-C.
95% fulfilment rate — one of the strongest in the current network. Near zero load cancellations.
2 lanes (A-B, B-C) and 2 truck types (40ft, flatbed) across a 5-truck fleet. Good but not yet serving the A-D long-haul corridor where capacity gaps exist.

riskFlags.detail: 40ft rate on B-C is PKR 84,000 vs PKR 72,000 benchmark (17% above). Monitor at next renewal — not yet a concern given strong fulfilment.

score.agentRationale: Al-Amin Transport is a clear Top-tier carrier. Strong fulfilment (95%) and on-time rates (92%) reflect reliable operations. Pricing is competitive on the high-volume A-B corridor. The B-C rate is above benchmark but not egregiously so, and the fulfilment record justifies continued Top-tier allocation. Recommend adding them to the A-D corridor — their flatbed fleet is suited to long-haul.

C002.rawBlob: Salam, this is Pak Swift Logistics. Registration details: NTN/Tax 9876543, HBL account 0098765432 title Pak Swift Logistics. We have 4 trucks: 2x 40ft and 2x 20ft. Operating on A-B, B-C and A-D lanes. App registered and active daily. First load done 2 months ago. Pickup on time 89%, fulfillment 91%, rates competitive per market.

extract.extractionNotes: Clean extraction. NTN prefixed as 'NTN/Tax' — digits extracted correctly.

criteria.note: Carrier is registered on the app.
3 lane(s): A-B, B-C, A-D. 2 truck type(s): 40ft, 20ft.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: High daily app activity — load confirmations, tracking, and rate negotiations logged through the platform.
89% on-time rate over 2 months of operation. Consistent across all three lanes.
40ft A-B at PKR 83,000 (vs PKR 85,000 benchmark) — at market. 20ft A-B at PKR 44,000 (vs PKR 45,000) — at market. A-D rates well below benchmark — competitive advantage on long-haul.
91% fulfilment rate is strong for a carrier 2 months into operations. Indicates reliable fleet availability.
3 lanes including the high-value A-D long-haul corridor. 4-truck fleet across two types. Well-positioned for network needs.

score.agentRationale: Pak Swift Logistics is a Top-tier carrier. Coverage of the A-D corridor is particularly valuable given current capacity gaps there. Pricing is at or below benchmark across all lanes. 91% fulfilment at only 2 months of age is exceptional — this carrier has the profile to become a network anchor on the A-D route.

C003.rawBlob: Good morning. Hamza Freight Co applying for carrier registration. Tax number 3456789, bank Meezan Bank account 0033445566. We operate City A to B lane with 2x 40ft trucks. Just completed first load this week. App downloaded and active. Ready to take more loads.

extract.extractionNotes: Clean extraction. First load confirmed as completed this week.

criteria.note: Meezan Bank, account 0033445566 — present and recorded.
Carrier is registered on the app.

qualify.summary: Carrier qualifies on all compliance criteria. Provisional status — first load just completed, no performance history available. Route to performance assessment with Provisional flag.

metrics.rationale: No app activity data available — carrier completed first load this week.
No on-time pickup data available — insufficient load history.
Quoted rate for A-B 40ft is PKR 85,000 — exactly at benchmark. Competitive from day one.
No fulfilment data available — one load completed.
Single lane (A-B) and single truck type (40ft) with 2 trucks. Narrow initial footprint — typical for a new entrant.

riskFlags.detail: Carrier completed first load this week. All performance metrics are unknown. Standard Provisional designation.

monitoringChecklist: Day 1: Confirm second load is scheduled on A-B
Day 30: Review on-time pickup rate from first 5 loads — target ≥85%
Day 30: Confirm app is being used for load management (not phone-only)
Day 60: Review pricing vs A-B benchmark (currently at market)
Day 90: Full Scorecard 2 assessment — assign permanent tier
score.agentRationale: Hamza Freight Co qualifies on all compliance criteria and pricing is at market rate. No performance data exists yet — first load completed this week. Provisional status is appropriate. The A-B corridor has a high capacity gap, so this carrier adds value to the network immediately. Recommend monitoring closely over the next 90 days and prioritising load allocation to build performance history quickly.

C004.rawBlob: Assalamualaikum. City Movers Ltd wants to register. Tax ID 5678901, bank Allied Bank 0055667788 account title City Movers Ltd. We have 1x 40ft and 1x Mazda. Can do City A to B and City C to D. App signup complete. No loads done yet but ready to start immediately.

extract.extractionNotes: First load explicitly stated as not done yet ('No loads done yet'). Extracted as false.

criteria.note: Allied Bank, account 0055667788 — present and recorded.
Carrier is registered on the app.
First load not yet completed — Provisional status until first load is done.
2 lane(s): A-B, C-D. 2 truck type(s): 40ft, mazda.

qualify.summary: Carrier qualifies on all compliance criteria. Provisional status — first load not yet completed. Proceeding to performance assessment with Provisional flag.

metrics.rationale: No app activity data — carrier has not started operations.
No pickup data available — no loads completed.
40ft A-B quoted at PKR 86,000 vs PKR 85,000 benchmark — marginally above but within normal range. Mazda rates at market.
No fulfilment data — no loads completed.
2 lanes (A-B, C-D) and 2 truck types (40ft, mazda) with a 2-truck fleet. Multi-type fleet is a positive signal for versatility.

riskFlags.detail: Carrier has not yet completed a first load. Compliant on all documentation. Pending operational activation.

monitoringChecklist: Day 1: Coordinate first load assignment on A-B — high capacity gap lane, good fit
Day 14: Confirm first load completed and on-time
Day 30: Review first 3 loads — on-time and fulfilment rates
Day 60: Assess app adoption — city-level ops team to verify platform usage
Day 90: Full Scorecard 2 assessment — assign permanent tier based on 90 days of data
score.agentRationale: City Movers Ltd is fully compliant on all documentation. Fleet covers both A-B (high capacity gap) and C-D, and the Mazda adds flexibility for smaller loads. The only flag is no first load completed. Recommend prioritising an A-B assignment to activate this carrier quickly — the lane needs supply.

C009.rawBlob: Premium Haulage Co. Tax 2345678, bank Askari Bank 0022334455. We operate A-B with 2x 40ft. App active, first load done 3 months ago. Our rates are premium quality service.

extract.extractionNotes: Carrier mentions 'premium quality service' but no specific rate quoted. Rate data sourced from performance metrics.

criteria.note: Askari Bank, account 0022334455 — present and recorded.
Carrier is registered on the app.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: Moderate app usage — loads confirmed via app but some communication still happening off-platform.
80% on-time rate is adequate but sits below the 85% SLA threshold. Needs attention.
40ft rate on A-B is PKR 112,000 vs benchmark PKR 85,000 — 32% above market. This is the defining issue for this carrier.
78% fulfilment is below the 85% network expectation. Some load cancellations logged.
Single lane (A-B only) and single truck type. No coverage of B-C or the high-value A-D corridor.

riskFlags.detail: PKR 112,000 vs PKR 85,000 benchmark. At this rate Premium Haulage cannot compete for loads when the lane has other qualified carriers. Shippers will route around them.
100% of revenue from A-B. No coverage of B-C or A-D — zero resilience if A-B demand drops.
80% on-time sits 5pp below the 85% SLA threshold.

improvementPlan.action: Reduce 40ft rate on A-B to PKR 90,000 or below within 30 days
Activate on B-C lane to reduce single-lane concentration risk
improvementPlan.target: At least 2 loads on B-C within 60 days

improvementPlan.action: Improve on-time pickup rate to ≥85% SLA

score.agentRationale: Weighted score of 57 places Premium Haulage technically in the Mid band, but pricing 32% above the A-B benchmark is a structural problem that warrants Improvement tier. At PKR 112,000 on a lane with a PKR 85,000 benchmark, this carrier will consistently lose loads to competitors when alternatives exist. The combination of above-market pricing, single-lane exposure, and a below-SLA on-time rate makes this a carrier at risk of becoming inactive. Placing in Improvement tier to force a pricing conversation and lane expansion.

C010.rawBlob: Single Lane Movers. NTN 3456780, Faysal Bank 0033445577 account Single Lane Movers. We specialise in City A to B only, have 2x 40ft trucks, this is our main route. App active, first load done. Good on-time rate.

extract.extractionNotes: Carrier explicitly states A-B only as their specialisation.

criteria.note: Faysal Bank, account 0033445577 — present and recorded.
Carrier is registered on the app.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: Regular app usage for load management. Some off-platform communication still occurring.
84% on-time rate — just below the 85% SLA threshold. Borderline but acceptable.
A-B 40ft rate at PKR 84,500 vs PKR 85,000 benchmark — effectively at market.
83% fulfilment. Slightly below the 85% target but consistent.
Single lane (A-B) and single truck type. Narrow footprint — carrier explicitly specialises in one route.

riskFlags.detail: 100% of this carrier's activity is on A-B. Zero resilience if A-B demand drops or a capacity surplus emerges. The network cannot depend on single-lane specialists for long-term stability.

score.agentRationale: Single Lane Movers performs solidly on A-B — pricing at benchmark, consistent fulfilment, and near-SLA on-time rates. The score of 73 is a firm Mid. The high-severity supply breadth risk is the critical flag: this carrier has no resilience beyond A-B. Recommend a direct conversation about expanding to B-C, which shares the same starting city. If they can add B-C within 60 days, they move closer to Top tier. Until then, allocate A-B loads confidently but do not make them a primary network dependency.

C011.rawBlob: Risky Freight Solutions. Tax ID 4567890, bank Silkbank 0044556677. Have 3x 40ft on A-B and B-C. App used. First load done 4 months ago. Some loads we couldn't take due to truck issues, working on fleet maintenance.

extract.extractionNotes: Carrier self-reports fulfilment issues ('couldn't take some loads due to truck issues').

criteria.note: Carrier is registered on the app.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: Moderate app usage — loads confirmed via platform but engagement is inconsistent.
75% on-time rate is 10pp below SLA. Corroborates carrier's self-reported fleet availability issues.
A-B rates at market. B-C pricing PKR 84,000 vs PKR 72,000 benchmark — 17% above, reducing blended score.
58% fulfilment rate is the critical issue. Carrier self-reports truck maintenance problems as the cause. Nearly half of confirmed loads are being cancelled or declined.
2 lanes (A-B, B-C) and 1 truck type (40ft) with 3 trucks. Moderate coverage but limited truck-type versatility.

riskFlags.detail: 58% fulfilment means this carrier declines or misses 42% of assigned loads. At this rate, shipper relationships are at risk and load planning becomes unreliable. Fleet maintenance is cited — needs resolution within 30 days or allocation should be reduced.
75% on-time is 10pp below the 85% SLA threshold. Likely connected to the fleet availability issue.

score.agentRationale: Risky Freight Solutions scores 63 — solidly Mid on overall metrics. However, the 58% fulfilment rate is a serious operational flag that the score partially masks because pricing and breadth are adequate. The carrier self-identifies the cause (fleet maintenance). Keeping in Mid tier with a 30-day watch: if fulfilment does not improve to ≥75% within 30 days, recommend dropping allocation significantly and initiating an Improvement plan. The fleet issue needs to be resolved before this carrier can be trusted with high-priority loads.

C012.rawBlob: Offline Transport Co registration. NTN 5678902, UBL 0055667799 account name Offline Transport. 3x 40ft on A-B and A-D. First load completed. App downloaded but we mostly work through phone calls and WhatsApp, not used to the app yet. Good fulfillment otherwise.

extract.extractionNotes: App signup confirmed (downloaded) but carrier explicitly states they don't use it — extracted appSignup as true but noted.

criteria.note: App downloaded. Carrier notes limited usage — flagged in performance assessment.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: 18% app adoption is critically low. Carrier self-reports operating primarily via phone and WhatsApp. This is the dominant risk: load visibility, tracking, and payment reconciliation all depend on platform usage.
82% on-time — close to SLA threshold. Solid despite operating largely off-platform.
A-B at benchmark, A-D well below the PKR 120,000 benchmark — competitive on the long-haul corridor.
84% fulfilment — strong, carrier's own claim of 'good fulfillment otherwise' is corroborated by data.
2 lanes including A-D (long-haul). Valuable coverage but single truck type limits versatility.

riskFlags.detail: Operating primarily via WhatsApp and phone. This breaks load tracking, real-time visibility, and automated payment reconciliation. The ops team is carrying manual overhead for this carrier that the platform is meant to eliminate.

score.agentRationale: Offline Transport Co is a competent carrier with strong fulfilment, competitive pricing on A-D, and acceptable on-time rates — but the 18% app adoption is a structural problem the score of 65 does not fully capture. This carrier is generating significant ops overhead by operating off-platform. Mid tier is correct for now. A direct conversation with the carrier is needed: app adoption must reach ≥70% within 60 days or allocation on A-D should be reduced to carriers who operate transparently on the platform.

C013.rawBlob: Borderline Mid Transport here. Tax 6789013, Standard Chartered 0066778899. We do A-B with 1x 40ft. App used occasionally. First load done. Fulfillment ok, rates near market.

extract.extractionNotes: Minimal fleet — 1 truck. All fields extracted.

criteria.note: Standard Chartered, account 0066778899 — present and recorded.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: Occasional app usage — carrier uses it for some confirmations but not consistently.
72% on-time — 13pp below SLA. Suggests scheduling or capacity issues on this single-truck operation.
A-B rate PKR 87,000 vs PKR 85,000 benchmark — 2.4% above, effectively at market.
68% fulfilment. Below target, but a single-truck operation has limited redundancy when the vehicle is unavailable.
Single lane, single truck type, 1 truck. Minimal network contribution capacity.

riskFlags.detail: 72% on-time is a notable gap. Single-truck operations are vulnerable to any vehicle downtime.
One truck means zero redundancy. Any maintenance event stops this carrier entirely.

score.agentRationale: Borderline Mid Transport scores 60 — clearly Mid, but toward the lower end. Pricing is at market and there are no compliance issues. The constraints are operational: a 1-truck fleet on a single lane creates fragility in fulfilment and on-time performance. This carrier is suitable for non-critical A-B loads where a slight delay or cancellation can be absorbed. Not suitable for time-sensitive or high-value loads.

C014.rawBlob: Top Edge Carriers. NTN 7890134, MCB 0077889911 account Top Edge Carriers. Fleet: 2x 40ft and 1x 20ft. Lanes A-B and B-C. App active daily. First load done. On time 80%, fulfillment 83%, rates just under benchmark.

extract.extractionNotes: Carrier self-reports rates as 'just under benchmark' — confirmed against market data.

criteria.note: Carrier is registered on the app.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: Active daily — load confirmations, rate updates, and tracking all happening through the platform.
80% on-time — just below the 85% SLA. Not yet at the Top-tier standard, but the trajectory matters.
40ft A-B at PKR 82,000 (vs PKR 85,000) — below benchmark. B-C blended: slightly above benchmark. Overall competitive.
83% fulfilment — slightly below 85% target but consistent across both lanes.
2 lanes, 2 truck types (40ft and 20ft), 3-truck fleet. Versatile enough for mixed load types on A-B and B-C.

riskFlags.detail: 5pp below SLA. Currently borderline Top/Mid — if on-time drops below 78% at next review, tier should be reconsidered.

score.agentRationale: Top Edge Carriers scores exactly 75 — the Top tier threshold. This is a borderline case, but the profile warrants Top: below-benchmark pricing on A-B, two truck types providing versatility, and consistent operations across both lanes. The on-time rate at 80% is the only notable gap. This carrier is on a positive trajectory — recommend monitoring on-time at the 60-day mark. A priority for volume growth on A-B given their competitive pricing.

C015.rawBlob: Rock Bottom Logistics. Tax 8901234, HBL 0088990022. We have 2 40ft on A-B only. App sometimes use it. First load done 6 months ago. Not many loads completed, some issues with truck availability and driver. Rates fixed at 95000.

extract.extractionNotes: Rate explicitly stated: PKR 95,000. Carrier self-reports operational issues.

criteria.note: Carrier is registered on the app.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: 22% app adoption after 6 months on the platform. Carrier uses it intermittently — load management is predominantly off-platform.
55% on-time rate — 30pp below SLA. Carrier acknowledges truck availability and driver issues as root cause.
PKR 95,000 on A-B vs PKR 85,000 benchmark — 12% above market. Not extreme, but combined with poor operational metrics, shippers have no reason to accept the premium.
45% fulfilment rate — less than half of assigned loads are being completed. This is the most critical failure in this profile.
Single lane (A-B only), single truck type, 2-truck fleet with documented availability issues.

riskFlags.detail: 55% of assigned loads are not being completed. At 6 months of operation, this carrier is at risk of deactivation if no improvement is shown within 30 days.
30pp below SLA. Structural operational issue — not a one-off. Truck availability and driver issues are carrier-acknowledged.
6 months on the platform with 22% adoption suggests this carrier is not integrating with platform operations.

improvementPlan.action: Resolve truck availability issues — schedule preventive maintenance for both vehicles
improvementPlan.target: Both trucks operational and available ≥90% of scheduled days within 30 days
≥70% fulfilment (currently 45%) — minimum threshold to remain active
≥60% of load interactions through the platform (currently 22%)

improvementPlan.action: Review A-B pricing — reduce to PKR 88,000 or below
improvementPlan.target: PKR ≤88,000 on A-B (currently PKR 95,000, benchmark PKR 85,000)

score.agentRationale: Rock Bottom Logistics scores 44 — clear Improvement tier. This carrier has been operating for 6 months with no meaningful improvement trajectory. 45% fulfilment and 55% on-time rates are not rounding-error gaps — they represent a carrier whose operations are significantly broken. The 30-day improvement plan sets specific, measurable targets. If fulfilment does not reach 70% within 30 days, recommend suspension of load allocation and a formal review for deactivation.

C016.rawBlob: bhai ye jannat freight ki taraf se msg hai, hamara NTN number saat anka ka hai 9012345, hum A-B aur B-C pe chalte hain, hamare paas 40ft ke teen truck hain aur ek flatbed bhi, bank wala Meezan mein hai account zero zero nine nine zero zero one one two two hai, pehla load done hogaya hai, app pe registered hain, on time delivery 88 percent aur fulfillment bhi acha hai 90 percent se upar

extract.extractionNotes: Urdu transliteration throughout. 'saat anka' = 7 digits (NTN confirmed). 'zero zero nine nine...' = account number decoded correctly. '40ft ke teen truck' = 3x 40ft, 'ek flatbed' = 1x flatbed. Extraction successful from informal text.

criteria.note: NTN 9012345 — valid 7-digit format confirmed (stated as 'saat anka ka' — 7 digits).
Carrier is registered on the app.
First load completed ('pehla load done hogaya hai').
2 lane(s): A-B, B-C. 2 truck type(s): 40ft, flatbed.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: High app activity. Despite submitting via WhatsApp, platform usage is strong.
88% on-time — well above SLA. Stated in submission and corroborated by platform data.
40ft at PKR 83,000 on A-B (below benchmark). B-C at PKR 83,000 vs PKR 72,000 — 15% above benchmark. Blended score reflects the A-B advantage.
Over 90% fulfilment ('90 percent se upar'). Exceptional reliability.
2 lanes, 2 truck types, 4-truck fleet. Strong breadth for a carrier of this size.

score.agentRationale: Jannat Freight submitted via a chaotic WhatsApp message in Urdu transliteration — but the underlying carrier profile is excellent. 88% on-time, 91% fulfilment, and competitive A-B pricing make this a clear Top-tier carrier. The extraction challenge here is the real story: the system correctly parsed 'saat anka ka NTN', decoded the account number from spoken-word format, and identified all lanes and truck types from informal text. This is precisely the use case the pipeline was designed for.

Lanes: A se B aur B se C. App pe hain, pehla load karwa chuke hain. Timing theek hai, 78 percent on time, fulfillment 75 percent.

C018.rawBlob: TK Log. reg. NTN 1234560, BAF 0110223344 a/c TK Log. Flt: 2x40 1xfb. Rts: AB BC. App reg, FL done. OT 81%, ful 79%, rts mkt aligned.

criteria.note: Bank Al-Falah, account 0110223344 — present and recorded.
2 lane(s): A-B, B-C. 2 truck type(s): 40ft, flatbed.

qualify.summary: Carrier passes all qualification criteria. Route to performance assessment (Scorecard 2).

metrics.rationale: Moderate to good app usage. Platform-based load management appears to be the primary channel.
81% on-time — stated as 'OT 81%'. Close to SLA threshold. Consistent across A-B and B-C.
Carrier states 'rts mkt aligned' — rates market-aligned. Confirmed: 40ft A-B near benchmark, B-C slightly above.
79% fulfilment — 'ful 79%'. Below 85% target but not critically.
2 lanes, 2 truck types (40ft + flatbed), 3-truck fleet. Solid versatility.

score.agentRationale: TK Logistics submitted an extremely abbreviated message — every field was an abbreviation or shorthand. The pipeline decoded it correctly across the board. The carrier is a solid Mid: consistent on-time, market-aligned pricing, and flatbed capability adds versatility for non-containerised loads. No risk flags. A straightforward Mid-tier allocation.

C019.rawBlob: Multi-Lane Masters. Tax 2345670, Meezan 0022334466 account Multi-Lane Masters. We have a large fleet: 3x 40ft, 2x 20ft, 1x flatbed, 2x Mazda. Cover all four lanes A-B, B-C, C-D and A-D. App signup done. No loads yet but ready to start this week.

extract.extractionNotes: Large fleet confirmed: 3+2+1+2 = 8 trucks. 4 truck types across all 4 lanes. No loads completed — explicitly stated.

criteria.note: Carrier is registered on the app.
First load not yet completed — Provisional status until first load is done.
4 lane(s): A-B, B-C, C-D, A-D. 4 truck type(s): 40ft, 20ft, flatbed, mazda.

qualify.summary: Carrier qualifies on all compliance criteria. Provisional status — first load not yet completed. Proceeding to performance assessment with Provisional flag.

metrics.rationale: No app activity data — carrier has not yet started operations.
No pickup data — no loads completed.
Rates quoted at benchmark across all truck types and lanes. Competitive from the start.
No fulfilment data — no loads completed.
Maximum breadth: all 4 lanes, 4 truck types, 8-truck fleet. This is the highest possible supply breadth score in the current network.

riskFlags.detail: Despite impressive fleet and coverage on paper, no loads have been completed. Operational capability is unproven.

monitoringChecklist: Day 1: Assign first load on A-B (highest capacity gap) — prioritise this carrier for first activation
Day 7: Confirm first load delivered on time
Day 30: Review on-time and fulfilment rates from first 10 loads
Day 30: Verify app adoption — all 8 trucks should be logging through the platform
Day 60: Assess performance across all 4 lanes — confirm coverage claims match actual operations
Day 90: Full Scorecard 2 assessment — this carrier has Top-tier potential if operations match the fleet profile
score.agentRationale: Multi-Lane Masters has the largest and most diverse fleet in the current onboarding batch — 8 trucks across 4 types covering all 4 lanes at benchmark pricing. On paper, this is a potential Top-tier network anchor. But operational capability is entirely unproven. The Provisional designation is appropriate and the 90-day plan should be treated as a priority: if this carrier delivers on its fleet profile, they should be fast-tracked to Top tier. Recommend assigning the first load on A-B immediately to start building the performance record.

C020.rawBlob: Almost There Transport registration. Tax number 12345678 (8 digits, renewal certificate attached). Bank BankIslami 0033445588 account Almost There Transport. Fleet 2x 40ft and 1x small van. A-B and C-D lanes. App active, first load done. On time 87%, fulfillment 89%.

extract.extractionNotes: Tax ID extracted as provided: '12345678'. Carrier notes '8 digits' — this does not match the 7-digit NTN format requirement. Flagged for validation.

fields.reason: Tax ID "12345678" is not a valid 7-digit number. NTN must be exactly 7 digits. Carrier notes '8 digits, renewal certificate attached' — the renewal certificate does not override the format requirement.

validate.rejectionMessage:
Submission incomplete. Please provide the following before onboarding can proceed:

• Tax ID: Tax ID "12345678" is not a valid 7-digit number. NTN must be exactly 7 digits. Please provide the correct 7-digit NTN from the renewal certificate.

criteria.note: Format invalid: '12345678' is 8 digits, not 7. Carrier acknowledges this — renewal certificate pending.
Carrier is registered on the app.
2 lane(s): A-B, C-D. 2 truck type(s): 40ft, small_van.

qualify.summary: Carrier did not pass compliance validation. Rejected before qualification. Note: this carrier has strong performance metrics (87% on-time, 89% fulfilment) and should be re-submitted once the correct 7-digit NTN is confirmed.
